title: The Art of Star Wars Episode II: Attack of the Clones
content:
{{Top|rwm|leg|ref|italics=1}}
{{ReferenceBook

|title=''The Art of Star Wars Episode II: Attack of the Clones''
|author=[[Mark Cotta Vaz]]
|cover artist=

|release date=[[April 23]], [[2002]]<ref name="Date">{{SWArchive|url=episode-ii/release/publish/news20020207.html|text=Book Preview: The Art of Episode II}}</ref>

'''''The Art of Star Wars Episode II: Attack of the Clones''''' includes more than 500 illustrations including sketches, costume designs, set pieces, models, and brilliant full-color paintings; an in-depth look at the new creatures introduced in Episode II; behind-the-scenes accounts and anecdotes related by the artists themselves; visuals of exotic planets, spacecraft, and characters such as [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]], Count [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]], and [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Luminara Unduli/Legends|Luminara Unduli]]; and poster art created especially for [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Star Wars'': Episode II ''Attack of the Clones'']]. It also features the illustrated screenplay.

==Continuity==
*Alien concepts that appear on page 15 and 38 can be spotted in the background on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] in "[[Chapter 21 (Star Wars: Clone Wars)|Chapter 21]]" of ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]''.
